## IContainer.createDecorator() method

Create a method decorator that works with both legacy and TC39 signatures.

**Signature:**

```typescript
createDecorator(handler: (args: {
        target?: object;
        methodName: string;
        descriptor?: PropertyDescriptor;
        method?: Function;
        context?: any;
    }) => any, type: 'method'): (...args: any[]) => any;
```
